examples: Because of its irritating effect on humans, the use of phenol as a general antiseptic has been largely discontinued.
The synthesis of (4-2-methoxyethyl) phenol was studied.
Catechin is a phenol antioxidant found in grape seeds.
It can be modified by mixing it with fresh water and a small amount of phenol-based surfactant.
China issued a second water-pollution alert within a month, when phenol, a dangerous chemical, leaked into the Yangzi river near Shanghai.
